result.reason: Prevent unhandled exceptions during tab closure by gracefully handling potential errors in protocol shutdown within ConnectionTab.OnFormClosing.
result.approach: Wrap all calls to `((InterfaceControl?)Tag)?.Protocol.Close();` in `ConnectionTab.OnFormClosing` with `try-catch` blocks to catch and log any exceptions that occur during protocol shutdown, thereby preventing unhandled exceptions from crashing the application.
